title: Back To New
description: Play with items, blocks and ores from 1.20.1!
body:
# RELEASE 1.0.0 IS OUT

## Status:

### 🟢 1.12.2 - Stable
### 🟤 1.7.10 - A lot of bugs, mostly unplayable
# 

## Play with new 1.20.1 items, ores, mobs and blocks on 1.12.2!
## Now you can collect:
![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33dde6458fff04502a695d9ee0f5284bb720e8a9.png)

and more other stuff!



But it's not all! Soon mod will be updated and you will can see your favourite blocks from 1.19.4-1.20!

## (Please, don't use another netherite adding mods, netherite items crafting mods etc.)
